summary: Comprehensive testing of DailyCart hyperlocal marketplace completed. Backend API testing achieved 91.4% success rate (32/35 tests passed). Frontend testing confirmed all 3 portals (Customer, Vendor, Admin) are functional with proper auth, discovery, and core workflows working.

minor_issues.impact: Test data issue only - .test is a reserved TLD per RFC, validation is technically correct

passed_tests: Backend: Health check API working
Backend: Auth email/password login for all roles (customer, vendor.mart, vendor.service, admin)
Backend: OTP send returns dev_otp in response
Backend: OTP verify logs in successfully
Backend: Discovery API returns different stores for Hyderabad vs Pune
Backend: Product search (q=rice) returns matching products
Backend: Multi-store checkout creates 2 sub-orders correctly
Backend: Checkout requires authentication (401 for anonymous)
Backend: Order status flow (placed→accepted→picking→ready→out_for_delivery→delivered) working
Backend: Invalid order status transitions rejected with 400
Backend: Service booking creation working
Backend: Slot conflict detection working (409)
Backend: Reviews working (after delivery)
Backend: Duplicate review prevention (409)
Backend: Vendor rating recomputation working
Backend: Disputes creation and admin resolution working
Backend: Admin oversight dashboard showing GMV, counts
Frontend Customer: Home page loads with Hyderabad stores and services
Frontend Customer: Email/password login working
Frontend Customer: OTP login working with dev OTP shown in UI alert
Frontend Customer: Store cards clickable and navigating to store detail
Frontend Customer: Products can be added to cart
Frontend Customer: Multi-store cart working (items from 2 stores)
Frontend Vendor: Login working for mart vendor
Frontend Vendor: Dashboard showing KPIs (pending, active, earnings, rating)
Frontend Vendor: Orders queue accessible and showing orders
Frontend Vendor: Order status tabs (All, Placed, Accepted, etc.) visible
Frontend Admin: Login working
Frontend Admin: Dashboard showing oversight metrics (GMV ₹633, 32 users, 24 live vendors, 1 KYC pending)
Frontend Admin: KYC queue accessible showing pending vendors
Frontend Admin: Vendors list accessible with activate/deactivate buttons
Frontend Admin: Recent orders and bookings visible on dashboard

detailed_notes.backend_testing: Tested 35 API endpoints covering auth (email/pw + OTP), discovery (geo-based, multi-city), checkout (multi-store), order/booking status machines, reviews, disputes, vendor onboarding, admin KYC, and oversight. All critical flows working correctly.
detailed_notes.frontend_testing: Tested all 3 portals (Customer /, Vendor /vendor, Admin /admin). Auth working for all roles. Customer can browse stores/services, add to cart. Vendor can view dashboard and orders. Admin can view oversight, KYC queue, and vendors list.
not_tested: Vendor order status advancement (clicking advance button)
Dispute creation from customer order detail
detailed_notes.testing_limitations: Due to time constraints and to avoid Playwright script loops, focused on critical path testing. Backend API testing was comprehensive (35 tests). Frontend testing verified all portals load and core navigation works. Detailed interaction testing (button clicks, form submissions) was limited to auth flows.
detailed_notes.geo_discovery_verified: Backend tests confirmed Hyderabad (17.385,78.4867) returns different stores than Pune (18.5204,73.8567), validating 2dsphere geo indexing is working correctly.
detailed_notes.multi_store_checkout_verified: Backend test confirmed checkout with items from 2 different stores creates 2 separate sub-orders with correct checkout_group_id.
detailed_notes.status_machines_verified: Order flow (6 states) and booking flow (5 states) both working with proper validation of invalid transitions.
detailed_notes.dev_mode_otp_working: OTP send returns dev_otp in response and frontend displays it in a blue alert box, making testing easy without SMS integration.
